surface_strategy: Retro-Futurism (The Terminal Look). Deep black backgrounds, neon green/cyan borders (border-green-500/50), exposed grid skeleton layout, subtle drop-shadow glows on active states. CRITICAL: 0px border-radius everywhere. Sharp edges only.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous outer padding (p-8) with dense, rigid inner components (gap-4) mimicking a technical control room.
layout.grid_protocol: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4). Tight gaps, full pixel utilization. The layout must feel like a connected telemetry screen.
layout.borders: border-collapse style styling. Expose the structural grid.

components.buttons: Flat transparent background, 1px solid primary border, text-primary. Hover: bg-primary text-black transition-all duration-200. NO default Shadcn rounded borders.
components.inputs: Shadcn deeply customized: bg-black border-b-2 border-primary rounded-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-secondary.
components.chat_bubbles: Cardless, rectangular, full-width. AI message: border-l-2 border-secondary pl-4 bg-secondary/5. User message: border-r-2 border-primary pr-4 text-right bg-primary/5.
components.disclaimer: text-xs text-accent uppercase tracking-widest mt-8 opacity-70
components.sidebar: Left navigation rail styled like a command menu with telemetry stats.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark cyberpunk texture for global app background or overlay
Cybernetic brain avatar for the AI persona in chat
Server rack visual to represent the Llama-server connection status

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a strict Cyberpunk Terminal interface. Do not use default Vercel/SaaS aesthetics. Enforce `data-testid` on all inputs, settings toggles, chat forms, and connection indicator elements. Completely strip all border-radius from Shadcn components. Use `lucide-react` icons but style them with neon drop-shadows. Maintain WCAG/APCA contrast for text readability over the dark background.
